articles.title: ILT20 Season 5 Schedule 2026: Dates & How to Watch
articles.what_this_means: ILT20 Season 5 shifts to November 22–December 20, 2026, offering Indian cricket fans in the US prime-time viewing for the first time. No more brutal early-morning match times—catch world-class T20 action during convenient holiday weekends instead.

articles.title: Prasidh Krishna Purple Cap IPL 2026 | Four-Wicket Haul
articles.what_this_means: Prasidh Krishna has taken command of the Purple Cap race at IPL 2026 with a four-wicket haul, while Virat Kohli and Rajat Patidar continue their dominance in the Orange Cap standings. US-based Indian cricket fans can catch all the action on ESPN+ and Willow TV.

articles.title: Swanepoel Gets NOC: IPL Dream Alive Amid Disciplinary Action 2026
articles.what_this_means: Beyers Swanepoel has received his NOC from CSA and can now play in IPL 2025, but South African cricket board is still pursuing disciplinary action against the fast bowler. For Indian diaspora cricket fans tracking India cricket live scores and IPL updates, this drama shows how international cricket politics work behind the scenes.

articles.title: EB-2 India May 2026 Visa Bulletin Prediction: Modest Forward Movement Expected
articles.what_this_means: EB-2 India is expected to move forward by approximately 12-14 days in May 2026, bringing the Final Action Date to around July 27-29, 2014. This represents a return to normal monthly movement after an exceptional surge in January, with low retrogression risk but persistent uncertainty due to the unpredictable 304-day jump earlier this year.

articles.title: Bhooth Bangla Release Date 2025: UA Rating & Runtime Update
articles.what_this_means: Bhooth Bangla, an upcoming Bollywood horror-comedy, has received its UA 16+ certification with a final runtime of 164 minutes after CBFC-approved edits. The film is cleared for theatrical release in India and will likely stream on Netflix, Prime Video, or Hotstar US within 4-6 weeks of its debut, making it a must-watch for Indian diaspora audiences seeking new Bollywood content.
